base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of samus_unused_palette_pose — a character (playable) from 1986 metroid. 'Unused' label — spare Samus pose present in ROM but not used in-game. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
